title: Beyond Code
intro: A few things that shape how I think and what I build.

items.title: Problem Solver
items.description: I love breaking down complex challenges into elegant, simple solutions.

items.title: Always Learning
items.description: Constantly exploring new tools, frameworks, and ideas to stay sharp.

items.title: Photography

items.title: Team Player
